creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
You're right. I was waiting for an email from ports-secteam@ approving the MFH and never received one.

However, looking at https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-qa-blanket I guess I could have MFH'ed the commit without waiting for approval, so sorry about that.

In the meantime, 2018Q2 has been branched and it should contain that change.
